ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the network (e.g., analyst, marketer) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection */,
  "user_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first user in the connection */,
  "user_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second user in the connection */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of connection (e.g., friend, colleague) */,
  "connection_date" TEXT /* Date when the connection was established */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the connection (e.g., active, pending, declined) */,
  "interaction_count" INTEGER /* Number of interactions between the users */,
  "last_interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connections_user_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id_1") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connections_user_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id_2") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the metric record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the metrics */,
  "closeness" REAL /* Closeness centrality metric for the user */,
  "betweenness" REAL /* Betweenness centrality metric for the user */,
  "modularity" INTEGER /* Modularity score indicating community membership */,
  "degree" INTEGER /* Degree (number of connections) of the user */,
  "eigenvector_centrality" REAL /* Eigenvector centrality metric for the user */,
  "clustering_coefficient" REAL /* Clustering coefficient metric for the user */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were computed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the community group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the community group */,
  "group_status" TEXT /* Status of the group (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the group's creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the group was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the group was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_groups_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "user_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-group association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user in the group */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community group */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the group */,
  "role_in_group" TEXT /* Role of the user within the group (e.g., admin, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_groups_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES community_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_groups_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign's objectives */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of the campaign (e.g., email, social media, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_metrics" (
  "campaign_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the campaign metric */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign associated with the metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric measured (e.g., reach, engagement) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "target_audience_size" INTEGER /* Size of the target audience */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_metrics_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions assigned to the role */,
  "role_status" TEXT /* Status of the role (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "permission_status" TEXT /* Status of the permission (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_metrics" (
  "historical_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the historical metric record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the metrics belong to */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded metrics */,
  "closeness" REAL /* Closeness centrality for the user on that date */,
  "betweenness" REAL /* Betweenness centrality for the user on that date */,
  "modularity" INTEGER /* Modularity score for the user on that date */,
  "degree" INTEGER /* Degree for the user on that date */,
  "eigenvector_centrality" REAL /* Eigenvector centrality for the user on that date */,
  "clustering_coefficient" REAL /* Clustering coefficient for the user on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., campaign, metrics) */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the sender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
